traits.name: Vigilant:
traits.desc: The defender can't be <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Surprised<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>

actions.name: Force-Empowered Rend:
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ your spell attack modifier to hit, reach 5 ft., one target you can see. _Hit:_ 1d8 + PB force damage

actions.name: Repair (3/Day):
actions.desc: The magical mechanisms inside the defender restore 2d8 + PB hit points to itself or to one construct or object within 5 feet of it.

reactions.name: Deflect Attack:
reactions.desc: The defender imposes disadvantage on the attack roll of one creature it can see that is within 5 feet of it, provided the attack roll is against a creature other than the defender.

traits.name: False Appearance.
traits.desc: The inconspicuous hamster is indistinguishable from a common hamster.

traits.name: Hidden Thoughts.
traits.desc: The inconspicuous hamster’s telepathy as well as its spell attacks do not reveal its location or identity. Furthermore, If a creature has half or more of its hit points after taking psychic damage from the inconspicuous hamster, the creature is unaware of the damage taken.

traits.name: Shielded Mind.
traits.desc: The inconspicuous hamster is immune to <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>scrying<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> and to any effect that would sense its emotions, read its thoughts, or detect its location.

actions.name: Multiattack.
actions.desc: The Inconspicuous Hamster makes two attacks

actions.name: Brain Probe
actions.desc: _Melee Spell Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 30 feet., one target. _Hit:_ 1 psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, the Inconspicuous Hamster can read the target’s thoughts until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Mental Meal
actions.desc: _Melee Spell Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 1 psychic damage. The Inconspicuous Hamster regains 2 (1d4) hit points and gains 2 (1d4) <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>temporary hit points<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>.

traits.name: Multiple Heads.
traits.desc: This Sock Hydra Begins Within 3 Heads. When It Takes 5 Or More Damage From A Single Attack, One Sock Head May Be Destroyed. At The start Of Its Next Turn, Two New Mismatched Sock Heads Sprout Unless Fire Damage Was Dealt. It Can Have Up To 7 Heads At Once.

traits.name: Static Cling.
traits.desc: Any Creature That Touches Or Grapples The Hydra Takes 1 Lightning Damage As Socks Crackle With Static Electricity.

traits.name: Missing Laundry.
traits.desc: Once Per Day, The Sock Hydra Can Teleport Up To 10 Feet To Any Container Of Clothing Can See.

actions.name: Sock Bite.
actions.desc: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +3 To Hit Reach 5ft, One Target *Hit* 3 (1d4+1) Bludgeoning Damage. The Hydra Makes One Attack Per Active Head.

actions.name: Static Snap (Recharge 6 Rounds).
actions.desc: The Sock Hydra Unleashes A Burst Of Static Electricity. Each Creature Within 10ft Must Succeed On A DC11 CON Save or Take 5 (2d4) Lightning Damage And Drop Any Metal Objects They Are Holding.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The rat has <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Advantage<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> on an <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>attack roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> against a creature if at least one of the rat's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Incapacitated<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: _Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>:_ +5, reach 5 feet. _Hit:_ 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage

traits.name: Agile
traits.desc: The rat doesn't provoke <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Opportunity Attacks<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: _Melee Attack Roll:_ +2, reach 5 ft. _Hit:_ 1 Piercing damage.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: _Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>:_ +5, reach 5 ft. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

monsters.name: Vampster Swarm
monsters.damage_resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.desc: The dragon can breathe air and water

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d10 + 8) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) acid damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 20 ft ., one target. Hit: 17 (2d8 + 8) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Frightful Presence
actions.desc: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or become <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>frightened<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

actions.name: Acid Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The dragon exhales acid in a 90-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw, taking 67 (15d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

reactions.name: Amphibious
reactions.desc: The dragon can breathe air and water.

reactions.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
reactions.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

legendary_actions.name: Detect
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon makes a Wisdom (<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Perception<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>) check.

legendary_actions.name: Tail Attack
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon makes a tail attack.

legendary_actions.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 15 ft. of the dragon must succeed on a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw or take 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage and be knocked <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>prone<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed.

spells: The dragon is an 18th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). The archmage can cast <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>disguise self<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> and invisibility at will and has the following wizard spells prepared

spells.Cantrips (at will): fire bolt, light, mage hand, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>prestidigitation<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, shocking grasp

spells.5th level (3 slots): cone of cold, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>scrying<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, wall of force

spells: * The archmage casts these spells on itself before combat.

monsters.name: Celestial Spirit
monsters.languages: Celestial, understands the languages you know

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The spirit makes a number of attacks equal to half this spell's level (round down).

actions.name: Radiant Bow (Avenger Only)
actions.desc: _Ranged <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>:_ Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, range 600 ft. _Hit:_ 2d6 + 2 + the spell's level Radiant damage.

actions.name: Healing Touch (1/Day)
actions.desc: The spirit touches another creature. The target regains <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Hit Points<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> equal to 2d8 + the spell's level.

monsters.name: Ushabti Royal Guard
monsters.damage_resistances: Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slahsing form nonmagical attacks
monsters.languages: Understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

traits.name: Construct Nature.
traits.desc: The ushabti doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

traits.name: False Appearance.
traits.desc: While the ushabti is motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal funerary statue.

traits.name: Healing Leech.
traits.desc: If a creature within 30 feet of the ushabti regains hp from a spell or magical effect, the creature regains only half the amount and the ushabti regains the other half.

traits.name: Immutable Form.
traits.desc: The ushabti is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day).
traits.desc: If the ushabti fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance.
traits.desc: The ushabti has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Necrotic Weapons.
traits.desc: he ushabti's weapon attacks are magical. When the ushabti hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra (2d8) necrotic damage (included in the attack).

actions.name: Multiattack.
actions.desc: The ushabti can use its Breath-Stealing Presence. It then makes two Khopesh attacks and one Medjai's Scepter attack.

actions.name: Khopesh.
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Medjal's Scepter.
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 15 (2d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Breath-Stealing Presence.
actions.desc: Each creature of the ushabti's choice within 30 feet of the ushabti and aware of it must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or take 9 (2d8) necrotic damage and be unable to speak or breathe for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the ushabti's Breath‑Stealing Presence for the next 24 hours.

actions.name: Enervating Surge (Recharge 5-6).
actions.desc: The ushabti emits waves of necrotic energy. Each creature within 30 feet of the ushabti must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 49 (11d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that can't breathe because of the ushabti's Breath‑Stealing Presence has disadvantage on the saving throw. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature also suffers one level of <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>exhaustion<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>. A Humanoid slain by this effect rises 1d4 hours later as a mummy under the ushabti's control, unless the Humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The ushabti can have no more than five mummies under its control at one time.

reactions.name: Sudden Strike.
reactions.desc: When a creature more than 5 feet away from the ushabti moves to a space within 5 feet of the ushabti, the ushabti can make one Khopesh attack against it.

legendary_actions.name: Move.
legendary_actions.desc: The ushabti moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary_actions.name: Medjai's Scepter (Costs 2 Actions).
legendary_actions.desc: The ushabti makes one Medjai's Scepter attack.

legendary_actions.name: Telekinesis (Costs 2 Actions).
legendary_actions.desc: Up to two creatures the ushabti can see within 60 feet of it must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or the ushabti moves the creature up to 30 feet in any direction (including upward). A moved target is then [restrained] until the start of the ushabti's next turn.

spells.1/Day Each: <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Protection From Evil And Good<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Tenser's Floating Disk<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Unseen Servant<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.desc: The dragon can breathe both air and water.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) force damage.

actions.name: Singularity Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: The dragon creates a shining bead of gravitational force in its mouth, then releases the energy in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 22 (5d8) force damage, and its speed becomes 0 until the start of the dragon's next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage, and its speed isn't reduced.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Dragon Makes Three Rend Attacks. It Can Replace Two Attacks With A Use Of Sleep Breath.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>: +7, Rech 10ft. HIt: 15 (2d10+4) Slashing Damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5 Rounds)
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, Each Creature In A 4ft Long, 5ft Wide Line. Failure 38 (11d6) Fire Damage. Success: Half Damage.

actions.name: Sleep Breath.
actions.desc: *Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14*, Each Creature In A 30ft Cone. *Failure:* The Target Has Teh <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Incapacitated<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> Condition Until The End OF IT's Next Turn, At Which Point It Repeats The Save. *Second Failure:*  The Target Has The <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Unconscious<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> Condition For 1 Minute. This Effect Ends For The Target If It Takes Damage Or A Creature Within 5ft Of It Takes An Action To Wake It.

traits.name: Ephemeral Movemnt
traits.desc: The incarnation can move through other creatures and objects as if they were <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Difficult Terrain<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, and its movement doesn't provoke <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Opportunity Attacks<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Magic <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Resistance<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>
traits.desc: The incarnation has <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Advantage<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The incarnation makes three attacks, using Bite or Miasmic Globule in any combination..

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: _Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>:_ +8, reach 5 ft. _Hit:_ 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage..

bonus_actions.name: shape-shift
bonus_actions.desc: The incarnation changes its size to Medium, Large, or Huge.

traits.name: Magic <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Resistance<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>
traits.desc: The incarnation has <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Advantage<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The incarnation makes two Vine attacks and uses Radiant Blast. It can replace one vine attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Blindness/Deafness<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> if available.

actions.name: Vine
actions.desc: _Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>:_ +9, reach 20 ft. _Hit:_ 18 (3d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is the incarnation's size or smaller, it has the <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Grappled<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> condition (escape DC 15) from one of two vines.

bonus_actions.name: shape-shift
bonus_actions.desc: The incarnation changes its size to Medium, Large, or Huge.

bonus_actions.name: Teleport
bonus_actions.desc: The incarnation teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The incarnation can't teleport while it has a creature <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Grappled<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>.

monsters.name: Abjurer Wizard
spells: The Abjurer Casts One Of The Following Spells, Using INT As The Spellcasting Ability (Spell Save DC 16)

spells.1/day each: Arcane Lock, Banishment, Globe Of Invulnerability, Invisibility, Wall Of Force

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Abjuerer Makes Three Burst Magic Attacks.

actions.name: Force Blast
actions.desc: Each creature in a 20-foot cube originating from the abjurer must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 36 (8d8) force damage and is pushed up to 10 feet away from the abjurer. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed.

reactions.name: Arcane Ward (Recharge 4 Rounds)
reactions.desc: When the abjurer or a creature it can see within 30 feet of it takes damage, the abjurer magically creates a protective barrier around itself or the other creature. The barrier reduces the damage to the protected creature by 26 (4d10 + 4), to a minimum of 0, and then vanishes.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Morningstar
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.

reactions.name: Unyielding
reactions.desc: When the guard is subjected to an effect that would move it, knock it <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>prone<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, or both, it can use its reaction to be neither moved nor knocked <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>prone<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>.

spells.Cantrips (at will): Control Flames, Fire Bolt, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Friends<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, Light, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Minor Illusion<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>

traits.name: Wreathed in Flame
traits.desc: For The Flamewrath, The Warm Version Of The <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Fire Shield<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> Spell Has A Duration Of *Until Dispelled*, The <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>FIre Shield<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> Burns For 10 Minutes After The Flamewrath Dies, Sonsuming Its Body

actions.name: <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Dagger<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>
actions.desc: _Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

monsters.name: Keeper of the Feather
monsters.speed: 30 ft. (Fly 50 Ft. in raven and hybrid form)

traits.name: Shapechanger
traits.desc: he keeper can use its action to polymorph into a raven-humanoid hybrid or into a raven, or back into its human form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its human form if it dies.

traits.name: Mimicry
traits.desc: The keeper can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a person whispering, a baby crying, or an animal chittering. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.desc: The keeper regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the keeper takes damage from a silvered weapon or a spell, this trait doesn't function at the start of the keeper's next turn. The keeper dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack (Human or Hybrid Form Only).
actions.desc: The keeper makes two weapon attacks, one of which can be with its hand crossbow.

actions.name: Beak (Raven or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 1 piercing damage in raven form, or 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage in hybrid form.

actions.name: Shortsword (Human or Hybrid Form Only).
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Hand Crossbow (Human or Hybrid Form Only).
actions.desc: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

monsters.name: Masked One of Arkan
monsters.languages: <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Common<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, Abyssal, Deep Speech, and one other language.

traits.name: Revealing Gaze
traits.desc: The Masked Ones's gaze creates an area, equivalent to a 60-foot cone, where concealment of any kind becomes almost impossible. The Masked One decides in which direction the cone is facing at the start of each of its turns. Creatures that enter that area must Succeed on a DC 18 Charisma saving throw or become revealed until they leave the area. A creature that succeeds the saving throw against the revealed effect is immune to the Masked One's revealing gaze trait for the next hour

traits.name: Herald of the Deep
traits.desc: The Masked One acts as the willful envoy of an unknowable entity, and is endowed with its otherworldly power in return. It gains the following benefits

traits.name: Deepsight
traits.desc: The Masked One can use a bonus action to focus its gaze, gaining truesight in an area equivalent to its revealing gaze until the end of its turn.

traits.name: Eldritch Blessing
traits.desc: The Masked One's AC includes its Charisma modifier. Additionally, when forced to make an Intelligence or Wisdom saving throw, it can make a Charisma saving throw instead.

spells: __Innate Spellcasting.__ The Masked One can cast the following spells innately, requiring no material components. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spel save DC 18 +10 to hit with spell attacks).
_At Will._ disguise self, eldritch blast (3 beams), invisiblity, mage armor
_3/Day._ cause arrhythmia, counterspell (at a 5th level spell), dimension door, hypnotic pattern
_1/day._ hellish retort, dominate person, wall of fire

actions.name: Eldritch Touch.
actions.desc: _Melee Spell Attack_ +10 to hit, reach 5ft., one target. _Hit 22 (5d8) psychic damage and the creature must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

spells.At Will: <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Chromatic Orb<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> (Cold Orb Obly; See Actions Below), <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Detect Magic<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Misty Step<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>

traits.name: Divine Being
traits.desc: Auril can't be <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>surprised<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> and can't be changed into another form against her will

traits.name: Divine Rejuvenation
traits.desc: When Auril drops to 0 <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>hit points<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, her body turns to slush and melts away. Auril instantly reappears in her second form, in an unoccupied space within 60 feet of where her first form disappeared. Her initiative count doesn't change.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day in This Form)
traits.desc: If Auril fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Auril has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Unusual Nature
traits.desc: Auril doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Auril attacks twice with her talons.

actions.name: Talons
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) cold damage.

legendary_actions.name: Talons
legendary_actions.desc: Auril attacks once with her talons.

legendary_actions.name: Teleport
legendary_actions.desc: Auril teleports to an unoccupied space she can see within 30 feet of her.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>: +5, Reach 5 ft. Hit:10 (2d6+3) Piercing Damage Plus 7 (2d6) Poison Damage.

bonus_actions.name: Petrifying Gaze (Recharge 4-6).
bonus_actions.desc: _Constitution Saving Throw:_ DC 12, Each Creature In A 30 Foot Cone. If The Basilisk Sees It's Reflection Within The Cone, The Basilisk Must Make The Save. _First Failure:_ The Target Has The <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Restrained<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> Condition And Repeats The Save At The End Of It's Next Turn If It Is Still <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Restrained<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, Ending The Effect On Itself On A Success. _Second Failure:_ The Target Has The <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Petrified<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> Condition Instead Of The <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Restrained<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> Condition

traits.name: Avoidance
traits.desc: If the displacer beast is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Incapacitated<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> condition.

traits.name: Displacement
traits.desc: <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack rolls<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> against the displacer beast have <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Disadvantage<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, since it projects an illusion that makes it appear to be near its actual location. This trait is suppressed while the displacer beast has the <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Incapacitated<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The displacer beast makes one Rend attack and one Tentacle attack.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: _Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>:_ +6, reach 5 feet. _Hit:_ 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage. If target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Prone<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The doppelganger makes two Slam attacks and uses Unsettling Visage if available.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: _Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>:_ +6 (with <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Advantage<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> during the first round of each combat), reach 5 ft. _Hit:_ 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus_actions.name: Shape-Shift
bonus_actions.desc: The <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>doppelganger<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> shape-shifts into a Medium or Small <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Humanoid<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

monsters.name: Accursed Defiler
monsters.damage_resistances: Necrotic, Bludgeoning, Piercing, Slashing, Non Magical

traits.name: Cursed Existence
traits.desc: When it drops to 0 hp in desert terrain, the accursed defiler's body disintegrates into sand and a parched breeze. However, unless it was killed in a hallowed location, with radiant damage, or by a creature under the effects of the <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>bless<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> spell, the accursed defiler reforms at the next sundown 1d100 miles away from where it died in a random direction.

traits.name: Sand Shroud
traits.desc: A miniature sandstorm constantly whirls around the accursed defiler in a 10-foot radius. This area is lightly obscured to creatures other than the accursed defiler. Wisdom (Survival) checks made to follow tracks left by the accursed defiler or other creatures that were traveling in its sand shroud are made with disadvantage.

traits.name: Undead Nature
traits.desc: The accursed defiler doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The accursed defiler makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the accursed defiler scores a critical hit, the target suffers one level of <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>exhaustion<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>.

actions.name: Sandslash (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The accursed defiler intensifies the vortex of sand that surrounds it. Each creature within 10 feet of the accursed defiler must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

monsters.name: Bone Executioner
monsters.damage_resistances: Piercing and Slashing from nonmagical weapons
monsters.senses: <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Darkvision<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> 60Ft, Passive Perception 10, Passive Insight 10, Passive Steath 10
monsters.languages: Understands The Languages It Knew In Life But Can't Speak

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.desc: If Reduced To 0HP, The Executioner Makes A *Constitution* Saving Throw (DC 5 + Damage Taken). On A Success, It Drops To 1HP Instead, Unless The Damage Was Radiant Or A <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Critical Hit<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>.

traits.name: Bone-Crushing Strike
traits.desc: Deals An Additional +2 *Bludgeoning* Damage To Targets Wearing <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Heavy Armor<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> Or With Natural Armor (Such As Dragons Or Golems)

traits.name: Executioner's Presence
traits.desc: When The Bone Executioner Scores A <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Critical Hit<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, All Creatures Of Its Choice Within 10ft Must Succeed On A DC 13 *Wisdom* Saving Throw Or Be *<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Frightened<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>* Until The End Of Their Next Turn.

traits.name: Execution Surge (Otional Rule)
traits.desc: When The Bone Executioner Reduces A Creature To 0HP, It Enters A Brutal Trance Of Undeath Until The End Of Combat 1. Its Great Maul Deals And Extra +1d8 *Bludgeoning* Damage On Hit 2. Its Skull-Crusher Ability Now Recharges On A 4-6 Rounds Instead Of  5-6 Rounds.

actions.name: Great Maul
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 To Hit, Reach 5ft, One Target. Hit: 14 (2d8+4) *Bludgeoning* Damage.

actions.name: Great Maul (Execution Surge)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 To Hit, Reach 5ft, One Target. Hit: 14 (3d8+4) *Bludgeoning* Damage.

actions.name: Skull-Crusher (Recharge 5-6 Turns)
actions.desc: The Executioner Makes A Devastating Overhead Smash. The Target Must Succeed ON A DC 14 *Strength* Saving Throw Or Be Knocked *<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Prone<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>* And *<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Stunned<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>* Until Start Of It’s Next Turn. Hit: 18 (3d8+4) *Bludgeoning Damage*.

actions.name: Skull-Crusher (Recharge 4-6 Turns)
actions.desc: The Executioner Makes A Devastating Overhead Smash. The Target Must Succeed ON A DC 14 *Strength* Saving Throw Or Be Knocked *<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Prone<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>* And *<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Stunned<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>* Until Start Of It’s Next Turn. Hit: 18 (3d8+4) *Bludgeoning Damage*.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the death knight fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead

traits.name: Magic <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Resistance<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>
traits.desc: The death knight has <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Advantage<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Marshal Undead
traits.desc: Undead creatures of the death knight's choice (excluding itself) in a 60-foot <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Emanation<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> originating from it have <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Advantage<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> on <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>attack rolls<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Incapacitated<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> condition.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
traits.desc: If the death knight is destroyed before it atones for its evil, it gains a new body in 1d10 days, reviving with all its <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Hit Points<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>. The new body appears in a location significant to the death knight.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The death knight makes three Dread Blade attacks.

actions.name: Dread Blade
actions.desc: _Melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Attack Roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>:_ +11, reach 5 ft. _Hit:_ 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) Necrotic damage.

legendary_actions.name: Dread Authority
legendary_actions.desc: The death knight uses Spellcasting to cast Command. The death knight can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Fell Word
legendary_actions.desc: _Constitution Saving Throw:_ DC 18, one creature the death knight can see within 120 feet. _Failure:_ 17 (5d6) Necrotic damage, and the target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken. _Failure or Success:_ The death knight can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: _Trigger:_ The death knight is hit by a melee <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>attack roll<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> while holding a <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>weapon<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>. _Response:_ The death knight adds 6 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss

traits.name: Swarm
traits.desc: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny raven. The swarm can't regain <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Hit Points<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> or gain <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Temporary Hit Points<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>.

actions.name: Beaks.
actions.desc: _Melee Attack Roll:_ +4, reach 5 ft. _Hit:_ 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the swarm is <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Bloodied<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>.

actions.name: Cacophony (Recharge 6).
actions.desc: _Wisdom Saving Throw:_ DC 10, one creature in the swarm's space. _Failure:_ The target has the <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Deafened<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> condition until the start of the swarm's next turn. While <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Deafened<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, the target also has <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Disadvantage<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> on ability checks and attack rolls.

spells.Cantrips: <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Dancing Lights<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Eldritch Blast<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Minor Illusion<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Ray of Frost<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Guidance<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Spare the Dying<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>

spells.1st Level: <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>False Life<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Feather Fall<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Grease<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Tashas Hideous Laughter<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Mage Armor<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Magic Missile<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Sleep<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Ray of Sickness<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>
